positive: Minimalist and elegant abstract illustration of a soaring mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant sunset sky. The mountains should have sharp, stylized peaks and deep, varying shades of deep indigo, dusty violet, and charcoal grey. Incorporate subtle, flowing celestial elements like crescent moons, stylized constellations, and wisps of ethereal clouds rendered in soft gold, pale coral, and creamy peach. The overall composition must be clean, high contrast, and centrally focused for apparel printing. Vector art style, flat graphic design, perfect negative space, graphic novel aesthetic, high detail, perfect symmetry.
